name: superdumb
description: Makes AI coding agents build radically simpler, human-centered websites and UX. 27 skills that force agents to: know the user before building, use their words not developer jargon, build minimum screens with smart defaults, handle every error gracefully, and review as an outsider before shipping. Battle-tested against 4 real codebases (280+ issues found). Use whenever building any user-facing page, form, flow, or component.
